subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The Wronged One of the horizons hath summoned creation unto truth and enjoined upon them praiseworthy virtues this day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین مظلوم آفاق خلق را بحق دعوت فرموده و باخلاق پسندیده امر نموده امروز
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity; oneness of humanity, @exhortations and counsels, @contention and conflict, @call to action
